4.reason: [The program simply prints every input integer as it reads it, without implementing any stack logic. It does not distinguish between operation codes (1, 0, -1) and pushed values, nor does it simulate push/pop operations or track stack state. For input "1 567 0 -1", it outputs all four numbers instead of only the popped value "567".]
